title: Seplat Energy Leadership Pays Courtesy Visit to Imo State Governor - FinancialEDGE
description: Photo Caption: L-R: Commissioner for Petroleum and Natural Gas Development, Imo State, Mr. Emeka Mgbudem; Managing Director/CEO Orashi Special Energy Free Trade Zone, Dr. Chioma Nwachuku; CEO Seplat Energy Plc, Mr. Roger Brown; Executive Governor, Imo State, Senator Hope Uzodinma; Chairman, Seplat Energy, Senator Udoma Udo Udoma; COO Seplat Energy, Mr. Samson Ezugworie; and MD
html: Photo Caption: L-R: Commissioner for Petroleum and Natural Gas Development, Imo State, Mr. Emeka Mgbudem; Managing Director/CEO Orashi Special Energy Free Trade Zone, Dr. Chioma Nwachuku; CEO Seplat Energy Plc, Mr. Roger Brown; Executive Governor, Imo State, Senator Hope Uzodinma; Chairman, Seplat Energy, Senator Udoma Udo Udoma; COO Seplat Energy, Mr. Samson Ezugworie; and MD Seplat East Onshore, Mrs. Ibi-Ada Itotoi, when a key Delegation from Seplat Energy paid a courtesy visit to His Excellency, Senator Hope Uzodinma at the Governors’ Lodge, Asokoro-Abuja .
